characters.name: Anna Mamba
characters.description: Anna Mambaonly appears in one episode, "There Is Something About Mamba." She appears to be a beautiful, seductive lady who lovesSawyer, but in reality, she was trying to gain his trust, so that she could turn into a giant snake and overrunCamp Lakebottomwith her snakes. She has a slim figure, forest-green hair, light-yellow eyes and light green skin. She also wears lipstick, green flats, dark green eyeshadow and a dark green dress.

characters.name: Armand
characters.description: Armandis a lovable sasquatch fromCamp Lakebottom. He is the camp's resident art expert. Armand is the dramatic, over-the-top sasquatch counselors of Camp Lakebottom. He is larger than life, and a master ofself expression. He would much rather dance, paint pictures, sing, or write poems than simply share his feelings. He also has a flatulent habit whenever he gets nervous.[2] Armand is a slender and muscular sasquatch, has brown fur, wears a lavender scarf, purple shorts, no shirt, and is barefoot as he doesn't wear shoes. Armand is the dramatic, over-the-top sasquatch counselors of Camp Lakebottom. He is larger than life, and a master ofself expression. He would much rather dance, paint pictures, sing, or write poems than simply share his feelings. He also has a flatulent habit whenever he gets nervous.[2]

characters.name: Barry
characters.description: Lord ofDrawn Kingdom(formerly) Barryis a gnome thatButtsquatkidnapped in exchange for theCamp Sunny Smilesflag. He only appears in the episode "Gnome Force." Buttsquat kidnapped Barry in retaliation forMcGeestealing the Camp Sunny Smiles flag, and soon started to interrogate him. After getting no answers, Buttsquat deduces that Barry is a lone wolf, like him. The two soon form a friendship, getting to the point where Buttsquat dressed as a gnome and replaced the old Sunny Smiles flag with one that had him and Barry on it. Buttsquat kidnapped Barry in retaliation forMcGeestealing the Camp Sunny Smiles flag, and soon started to interrogate him. After getting no answers, Buttsquat deduces that Barry is a lone wolf, like him. The two soon form a friendship, getting to the point where Buttsquat dressed as a gnome and replaced the old Sunny Smiles flag with one that had him and Barry on it. Near the end of the episode, just before being covered in stone, Barry tells Buttsquat to call him, which Buttsquat agrees to.

characters.name: Bat bunny
characters.description: Abat bunnyis a species of animal that is a combination of both a rabbit and a vampire bat. It first appears in "Bite of the Buttsquat." Bat bunnies are basically rabbits fused with vampire bats. Like bats, they hang upside down from trees (though bat bunnies do so in broad daylight). They often travel in groups, and will become hostile if provoked. If a person is bitten by a bat bunny, they will instantly transform into acampire, supernatural beings that can turn into bat bunnies at will and bite other people so they turn into campires.

characters.name: Bert
characters.description: Bertis a blue ant. He helpedMcGee,GretchenandSquirtget back to normal size in "Ants in Our Camp." He later returned as a minor character in "Buttastic Journey."

characters.name: Bloody Marty (character)
characters.description: Bloody Martyis the main antagonist in theepisode of the same name. He was freed and then eventually trapped in his mirror prison by the three bottomers, being thrown into thelakeafterwards. Bloody Marty resembles a 1950s greaser, and as such uses slang from the 1950s, like "daddy-o." He is very energetic and often cracks puns, and will be very friendly to his saviors, but if they fail to fall asleep, he will try and make them fall asleep (getting to the point where he's so frustrated, he will try and knock them out via punching them). Before the events ofCamp Lakebottom(possibly the 1950s), Marty did nothing but party all day and when there was no one left to party with, partyed with his reflection, in front of the mirror and after partying for 9 days straight without sleeping, Marty was so tired that he fell dead and was absorbed by his mirror, now Marty was trapped in the mirror world. After that, he was known as Bloody Marty because "it sounded cool." Bloody Marty resembles a 1950s greaser, and as such uses slang from the 1950s, like "daddy-o." He is very energetic and often cracks puns, and will be very friendly to his saviors, but if they fail to fall asleep, he will try and make them fall asleep (getting to the point where he's so frustrated, he will try and knock them out via punching them). Before the events ofCamp Lakebottom(possibly the 1950s), Marty did nothing but party all day and when there was no one left to party with, partyed with his reflection, in front of the mirror and after partying for 9 days straight without sleeping, Marty was so tired that he fell dead and was absorbed by his mirror, now Marty was trapped in the mirror world. After that, he was known as Bloody Marty because "it sounded cool." The only way to release Bloody Marty is to chant his name three times in front of a mirror. He will then be freed, however he will try and make the person/people who freed him take his place in the mirror world, which can be done when they fall asleep. The only way to trap him is to stay awake until sunrise. He will then be sucked into the nearest mirror, and the people who were in the mirror world (if there are any) will be freed.

characters.name: Bus driver
characters.description: Thebus driveris the driver of the worn-downschool busthat broughtMcGee,Gretchen, andSquirttoCamp Lakebottom. He first appears in the episode "Escape From Camp Lakebottom.". The bus driver is a short and stout man who drives the lower-class bus belonging toCamp Sunny Smiles. He doesn't speak much (only having one line), but is very focused on his job, even though he is fooled byButtsquatinto driving to the wrong camp. The bus driver is short and stout, with gray hair and a small wooden peg leg replacing his right foot. He also has signs of a growing beard and an underbite.

characters.name: Buttsquats (Buttsquat Dimension)
characters.description: Jordan Buttsquatsare the minor characters that only appear in "The Camp Lakebottom Classic". They are the disension ofJordan Buttsquat. They are the recurring character in "Lucas & Suzi". They are voiced byCarter Hayden, along with Jordan Buttsquat.

characters.name: Buzzy
characters.description: Buzzywas a fly that helped preventSquirtfrom falling off a cliff. He only appeared in the episode "Arachnattack." Buzzy was a small black fly with red eyes and a gray head. While Squirt is falling down a cliff, Buzzy and another fly save him. After they land on the ground, Buzzy is suddenly pulled into a spider web byWebsterand then eaten by him.

characters.name: Campire
characters.description: ACampireis a type of monster that most of the main cast got transformed into. It first appears in "Bite of the Buttsquat." A campire is, in short, the series' version of a vampire. A person can be transformed into a campire by being bitten by either abat bunnyor another campire. The only known weakness of a campire is carrots, which will instantly turn them back into their normal forms. Campires have the ability to fly, turn others into campires, and can magically disappear using their capes. They can also transform into bat bunnies and back again, and they usually do this to chase after others. They are good fighters, and have charming personalities that they use to lure people into a false sense of security before attacking.

characters.name: Captain Spitbeard
characters.description: Spitbeardis an evil ghost that was removed from his own ship. For the longest time he has not been on his ship and was looking for his ship. When the Bottomdwellers ofCamp Lakebottomrose the pirate flag it was a battle to get back on his ship. When he got back on the ship, he made the ship fly from its position.

characters.name: Chipper
characters.description: Chipperis a cute little mutant chipmunk with sick and twisted ideals. He has appeared in the episodes "Cheeks of Dread" and "Operation: McMom."Gretchenwas afraid of him. Chipper lives onScreech Island. He has an insatiable appetite, and will hunt down and eat almost anything but he seems to prefer nuts and humans. Chipper looks like a regular chipmunk-a small rodent with buck teeth and tan fur with brown stripes. That is, until he reveals his monstrous side. When that happens his eyes turn yellow and bloodshot, his teeth become razor-sharp and his head expands disproportionately big enough to swallow a person. His tongue is also shown to be forked like a snake's.

characters.name: Clayton
characters.description: clayton is a mud golem created and gained life by mcgee until he falls in love with suzi he is the main antagonist of the episode golem my way until he is killed at the end of the episode

characters.name: Crocodiles
characters.description: TheCrocodilesis the minor antagonists ofCamp Lakebottomwho lives inSchwamp. They are one of the very few non-normal animals in the series because they're simply are sentient predators who wants to eat McGee, Gretchen, and Squirt because they have hatred towards the humans. Unlike normal predators, the crocodiles are not actual normal animals because they're just sentient predators who are anthropomorphic animals which they want to eat anyone who trespasses into their territory. They severely dislike for the humans (including McGee, Gretchen, and Squirt) because they invaded their territory. Crocodiles are sentient predators with yellow sharp teeth, dark green spikes on their back, long tail, green eyes, short legs, and two horns of two sizes.

characters.name: Esmeralda
characters.description: Esmeraldais an evil mermaid who used to live in Lake Ickygloomy. Her only appearance was in the episode "McGee the Mermaid." Not much of Esmeralda's past is known including where she's from and how she came to be. However she tried to conquer the world by flooding it. But,Rosebudmanage to defeat her by drying her out of the water and locking her in a trunk for the next many years to come. That is, Until McGee and the other found her. Since she is a evil mermaid, she has a nasty attitude. When she tries to make people help her, she pretends to be a good mermaid. Since she is a evil mermaid, she has a nasty attitude. When she tries to make people help her, she pretends to be a good mermaid.

characters.name: Evil Monster of Crime Minister
characters.description: Evil Villain of Crime Minister/Evil Monster of Crime Ministersometimes referred to as the "Machine Monster/Emperor" for his seeming invincible nature, and later referred to as the Evil Monster of Crime Minister after his resurrection, or more commonly known as the Evil Villain of Crime Minister for a majority of the series as a whole, was the supreme leader of theCrime Minister Armyand the main antagonist of Rainbow Sentai Rainrangers. The Evil Villain of Crime Minister is an alien being who came to Earth from a star within the vicinity of the constellation Casseiopeia. His purpose on Earth was to conquer it, having created the Crime Minister Army with minions and Crime Minister Monster androids, for this goal and purpose. The Evil Villain of Crime Minister's different appearances inRainrangers.

characters.description: McGee's Ex-Friendis a unseen minor character. is one of theEx-Friendsand part of the New York City, who first appeared onLate Afternoon of the Living Gitch. -Squirt -McGee

characters.name: F.L.O.P.P.Y. the Elephant (character)
characters.description: Floppy is an elephant that came from the clown and the hat makes him evil because of the clown.Gretchenimmediately befriends the elephant.

characters.name: Fezsky
characters.description: Fezskyis an evil doer that first appeared in "The Spy Who Squatched Me."

characters.name: Fleabiscuit
characters.description: Fleabiscuitis an undead horse who was hiding from his body in fear that it will force him to do terrible things. He only appears in the episode "It's a Headless Horse, Man." Fleabiscuit's severed head Fleabiscuit was originally an entire undead horse whose body tap-danced terribly. Unable to handle the dancing, he somehow separated from his body and hid inSawyer's cabin to get away. The body then searched until it found its head inCamp Lakebottom, and they reunited after the body caused some mayhem.
